inline_comments.message:
For what applications do we need this for?
Resources, traversal, graphadmin don't repackage a jar on restarts. 
Can you specify which microservices are you planning to use this for?

It's data-router and sparky-be.

data-router/src/main/bin/start.sh:
jar uf0 $MICRO_HOME/data-router.jar BOOT-INF/lib/* 

sparky-be/sparkybe-onap-application/src/main/scripts/start.sh:
jar ufv ${APP_HOME}/lib/sparkybe-onap-application*.jar -C ${CONFIG_HOME}/portal/ BOOT-INF/classes/portal.properties -C {CONFIG_HOME}/portal/ BOOT-INF/classes/key.properties

Is it still required?

And second point is that all packages are installed in common image in order to keep child images unaware of base - whether it alpine, ubuntu or anything else.
ok got it. In that case, I am ok with using this. I was just trying to see which microservices are using it. Thanks.
